scripts.dev:kill-port: lsof -ti :1420 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti :1421 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; true
scripts.clean: cargo clean && rm -rf apps/spanwork/dist apps/spanwork/release apps/spanwork/src-tauri/gen/apple/build apps/spanwork/src-tauri/gen/apple/Externals apps/spanwork/node_modules/.vite .turbo apps/spanwork/.tanstack && find . -name '*.tsbuildinfo' -not -path './node_modules/*' -delete
scripts.tauri:ios:dev: pnpm dev:kill-port && pnpm --filter @spanwork/app tauri ios dev --host $(ipconfig getifaddr en0 2>/dev/null || echo 0.0.0.0)
